series_metadata.series_title: CIGARETTES SOLD TO ANOTHER OHIO LICENSED WHOLESALER
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports, supporting schedules and related documentation that report stamped and unstamped cigarettes sold to another Ohio licensed wholesaler.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 years after the end of the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Electronic: Delete 3 years after the end of the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
